name: elosurgery
description: Repo root: Next.js app lives in web/. Use npm run dev from here or cd web && npm run dev.

scripts.ci: python -m pytest tests/ && npm --prefix web run lint && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.ci:install: python -m pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && npm --prefix web ci
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci:install && npm run ci
